title: BC Societies Act compliance obligation pack
description: Draft operational schedules for core BC society annual maintenance, meeting, records, and bylaw evidence obligations.

rules.title: Annual report filing deadline
rules.summary: Track BC annual report filing from the annual general meeting date.

authority.displayCitation: BC Societies Act annual general meeting and annual report workflow

checklist: Confirm the annual general meeting date and directors continuing or elected.
Verify registered office, records office, mailing address, and current directors.
Prepare the annual report filing packet.
File through BC Registries/Societies Online or the approved service path.
Capture confirmation number, receipt, and filing evidence.

rules.caveat: Operational filing deadline; confirm current BC Registry instructions and whether the AGM date or written resolutions affect the practical filing workflow.

rules.title: Annual general meeting planning deadline
rules.summary: Track annual meeting planning against the fiscal year end.

authority.displayCitation: BC Societies Act AGM timing guidance

checklist: Confirm AGM timing against fiscal year end and bylaws.
Prepare notice, agenda, financial statements, and director election materials.
Archive minutes, attendance, resolutions, and supporting documents.

rules.caveat: Meeting timing can depend on bylaws, extensions, written resolutions, and current registry guidance.

rules.title: Annual records and inspection readiness review
rules.summary: Track an annual review of records required to be kept and inspection-ready.

checklist: Review required records, location, and access controls.
Confirm member and public inspection paths against bylaws and legislation.
Archive the review memo and any corrective tasks.

rules.caveat: Use as an operational review cadence; exact inspection rights depend on record type, bylaws, and current legislation.
